name: BJ's One Mastercard
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee on the card itself (requires paid BJ's membership)

verdict.text: Only makes sense layered on top of a BJ's membership you already pay for — the card itself is free, but it's useless without an active club membership

earn_rates.category: In-club at BJ's, BJs.com & the BJ's app
BJ's Gas — discount at the pump, not a rewards rate

earn_note: This is the base tier: 3% at BJ's and 1.5% everywhere else, paired with the standard Inner Circle membership (~$55/yr). The richer BJ's One+ card earns 5%/2% but requires upgrading to the pricier Perks+ membership (~$110/yr) — don't confuse the two. Gas at BJ's Gas is a per-gallon discount taken at the pump, not rewards points, and doesn't stack with the earn rate. Excludes BJ's membership fees, alcohol, tobacco, lottery, gift cards, and a few other categories.

redemption_options.method: In-club, BJs.com, or BJ's app — applied like cash toward purchases

points.per_100k: Not applicable — rewards accrue as a dollar balance, not a points currency
points.note: A flat cash-back balance, not points. Redeemable once it hits a $10 minimum, in any increment above that, only at BJ's. Doesn't expire as long as the account stays open. There's no cash-out to a bank account or statement credit — it's locked to BJ's.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners and no travel redemption — rewards are a closed-loop balance usable only at BJ's.

protection_note: A bare-bones retail Mastercard with none of the usual Mastercard World/World Elite protection suite documented in its terms — no purchase protection, no extended warranty, no travel coverage. Treat it as a pure earn-and-redeem tool, not a card to charge big purchases on for protection reasons.
rental_note: No rental car coverage of any kind.

services.name: BJ's membership required
services.detail: You must be an active, paying BJ's member (Inner Circle, ~$55/yr) to apply for or use this card — it's not a substitute for membership and doesn't discount it.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: 0% on purchases made outside the US, per the cardholder agreement.

services.name: Card lock & account management
services.detail: Mobile app card lock, autopay, and flexible due-date selection via Capital One's servicing platform.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns the same rewards rate (into your account)

additional_cards.note: Free to add, but the household still needs its own BJ's membership card at the register — this credit card doesn't grant club access on its own.

timeline.text: Capital One took over as issuer from Comenity, relaunching the BJ's Perks Plus Mastercard as BJ's One and the BJ's Perks Elite Mastercard as BJ's One+, on the Mastercard network.
